children.name: IngestData
children.purpose: Read raw data from source, parse records, store in raw_data, and log ingestion
children.behavior: Based on source type (csv/json/api), read from path/url, parse into list of dicts, store in raw_data, and append log entry to pipeline_log
children.signature: def IngestData(pipeline_request: dict, raw_data: list, pipeline_log: list) -> dict

global_vars.description: Write parsed records into raw_data store

constraints.description: Must not modify processed_data or any other global store beyond raw_data and pipeline_log

acceptance_criteria.description: raw_data contains all parsed records from source
pipeline_log contains an entry for the ingestion step with timestamp and record count

children.name: TransformData
children.purpose: Apply transformation rules to raw_data, store in processed_data, skip malformed records
children.behavior: Read raw_data, apply each rule (field, operation, value) to each record, skip records that cause errors, store valid results in processed_data, log transformation
children.signature: def TransformData(pipeline_request: dict, raw_data: list, processed_data: list, pipeline_log: list) -> dict

global_vars.description: Write transformed records into processed_data store

constraints.description: Must not modify raw_data or any other global store beyond processed_data and pipeline_log

acceptance_criteria.description: processed_data contains all successfully transformed records
pipeline_log contains an entry for the transformation step with timestamp and record counts

children.name: ValidateData
children.purpose: Check processed_data against quality rules, mark invalid records, compute quality_score
children.behavior: Read processed_data, apply quality rules to each record, compute quality_score (e.g., based on missing fields or rule violations), mark invalid records, log validation
children.signature: def ValidateData(pipeline_request: dict, processed_data: list, pipeline_log: list) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read and update processed_data with validation marks and quality scores

data_operations.description: Read records, mark invalid, compute quality_score

constraints.description: Must not modify raw_data or any other global store beyond processed_data and pipeline_log

acceptance_criteria.description: Each record in processed_data has a quality_score field
Invalid records are marked with a validation_status field
pipeline_log contains an entry for the validation step with timestamp and record counts

children.name: ExportData
children.purpose: Format validated records as output in requested format, log export
children.behavior: Read processed_data, filter only records that passed validation, format as csv or json, store in pipeline_result data field, log export
children.signature: def ExportData(pipeline_request: dict, processed_data: list, pipeline_log: list) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read processed_data to filter validated records for export

constraints.description: Must not modify raw_data, processed_data, or any other global store beyond pipeline_log

acceptance_criteria.description: Output data contains only records that passed validation
Output format matches the requested export_format (csv or json)
pipeline_log contains an entry for the export step with timestamp and record count

governance_notes: Parent global state conservation verified: raw_data (read_write) covered by IngestData(write) + TransformData(read); processed_data (read_write) covered by TransformData(write) + ValidateData(read_write) + ExportData(read); pipeline_log (read_write) covered by all children (write). No parent operation dropped.
